items.title: World Economic Forum Chief Resigns Over Epstein Ties
items.description: Borge Brende, a former foreign minister of Norway, had maintained contact with the convicted sex offender.

items.title: The Trumpiest Trump We’ve Ever Beheld
items.description: The president is becoming the very thing that destroyed the Democrats: a reality-denying machine.

items.title: Russia Launches Big Strikes Before U.S.-Ukraine Talks in Geneva
items.description: Moscow unleashed an extensive drone and missile attack just hours before American officials were set to meet with Kyiv’s chief negotiator.

items.title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
items.description: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.

items.title: Child Care Giant Let Some Staff Work Without Full Vetting, Records Show
